title: Institutional Compost Loyalty Loop
problem_or_desire: High workplace organic waste volume with no benefit or impact reflection
core_concept: Closing the loop on office coffee waste by returning composted material to the office environment.
proposed_approach: A closed-loop service that collects office coffee grounds and delivers finished compost from a local partner to the office's indoor/outdoor plants.
prototype_scope: A pilot with 3 offices using a local community garden partner to process grounds and return finished compost. | Identify 3 offices with plant maintenance needs.; Partner with a local community garden for composting.; Establish a weekly bucket exchange schedule.

title: SyllabusSwap
problem_or_desire: Finding open-source creative examples for repetitive academic assignment prompts
core_concept: Searchable registry of verified academic supplemental material
proposed_approach: Gamified metadata tagging for faculty members to recommend specific outside readings for specific syllabus modules
prototype_scope: Directory of three dummy course modules where items can be liked, sorted, and suggested via form submission

title: Substack Monetization Audits
problem_or_desire: Creators struggling to convert free subscribers into paid members
core_concept: A manual 10-point audit tool focused purely on the 'pricing page' conversion funnel
proposed_approach: Audit reports delivered via Loom video analyzing email sign-up landing page effectiveness
prototype_scope: Ten free experimental audits performed for beta users

title: Coffee Education for Seniors
problem_or_desire: Lack of accessible, low-pressure social learning environments
core_concept: In-home coffee brewing workshops focusing on manual methods like pour-over and French press
proposed_approach: Small group sessions hosted in community centers or private homes
prototype_scope: Three workshops for a group of 6 participants

title: Sleep Sentinel
target_user: Light sleepers suffering from screen light overstimulation
problem_or_desire: Late night fidgeting and phone reliance impacting transition to REM cycles
core_concept: Audio-only tactical adventure navigable through haptic and voice commands.
proposed_approach: An audio-only adventure game where players navigate a simple maze using voice commands.
prototype_scope: Calibration of gyroscope-to-rotation mapping for selecting directions within a simple 3x3 audio maze. | Record audio cues for maze navigation; Implement voice command recognition; Build simple 3x3 maze logic

title: Virtual Co-working Accountability Partner
problem_or_desire: Lack of structure and social pressure to complete daily tasks
core_concept: A platform that pairs users for 90-minute silent, video-on co-working sessions
proposed_approach: Automated scheduling and pairing based on time zones and task types
prototype_scope: A simple scheduling calendar that pairs two users for a Zoom session

title: Institutional Waste Conversion Catering
problem_or_desire: Requirement to serve ethical, low-impact high-quality group catering
core_concept: Meals prepared exclusively from 'ugly' or near-expiry restaurant bulk raw materials
proposed_approach: Maintain partnerships with high-end food distributors to repurpose unpicked perfectly edible industrial excess
prototype_scope: Catering 5 lunches for one specific office office environment focusing on total reduction of carbon-spend data collection

title: Post-Coffee Circadian Monitoring
problem_or_desire: Overdose on caffeine causing unintended interference with evening sleep and focus patterns
core_concept: Optimizing caffeine intake based on individual sleep readiness.
proposed_approach: A service where users manually input their sleep data from a wearable, and receive a daily recommendation for their coffee roast and amount.
prototype_scope: A 10-person pilot where users report sleep data and receive a daily email recommendation. | Recruit 10 users with wearables.; Set up a manual email system for daily recommendations.; Run the pilot for 2 weeks.

title: Subscription Audit Concierge
problem_or_desire: Difficulty tracking and canceling unused software subscriptions
core_concept: A manual audit service that identifies and cancels redundant digital tools
proposed_approach: Users upload billing statements; a human analyst identifies overlaps and executes cancellations
prototype_scope: A simple landing page with a secure file upload form and a manual email-based reporting system

title: SEO Decay Alert System
problem_or_desire: Losing existing traffic revenue to un-indexed updates in Google search result pages
core_concept: Threshold alerts triggered by rank fluctuation, mapping back to specific page edit suggestions
proposed_approach: Lightweight wrapper over monitoring data that notifies creators exactly what snippet needs revision
prototype_scope: Plugin analyzing URLs via search metrics to provide alert-based revision suggestions
